title: SPBR-GlowingOre
description:
SPBR Patches
Add Glowing Ore into the world.
Find all diamonds hiding in the dark.
body:
# SPBR GlowingOre Patch
This is a Patch Pack for [SPBR](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/spbr)  
Add Glowing Ore into the world.   
Find all diamonds hiding in the dark.  
**This Pack is made under LabPBR standard**  
If you want to use this pack you need a LabPBR supported Shader.  
And should put it _above_ the SPBR Main Pack
![GlowingOre](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/835016a4d0f6a76ae996592be55b5022685acd7f.jpeg)
![GlowingOre](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1bd9d6cee8fd716adc9dca7f2adebfe22bc57602.jpeg)
_This Pack Can Also Be Use With Other Vanilla-Like 16x Pack._
